hero.desc: Ta'limHub is a platform that helps you learn anything from anywhere.

about.description: Ta'limHub makes global education accessible in your native language. Unlock knowledge from world-class educators, instantly translated and dubbed by AI.

card1.title: AI-Powered Dubbing
card1.desc: Unlock global knowledge. Access top courses from Ivy League and world-class universities, instantly voiced in your native language by advanced AI.

card2.title: Borderless Knowledge
card2.desc: Don't just watch, fully engage. Access over 50+ languages with native-level AI voiceover. Learn without limits from the very best.

card3.title: Smart Learning Paths
card3.desc: Your education, personalized. Real-time progress tracking, AI-powered course recommendations, and personal development paths.

whatt.description: Ta’limHub connects educators and students in one AI-powered ecosystem.

educators.title: For Educators
educators.desc: Teach globally, dub automatically. Expand your reach with AI dubbing technology.

students.title: For Students
students.desc: Global Courses, Local Sound. Access world-class education in your native language.

feature.description: Ta’limHub blends live education, replays, and AI language technology to help you learn faster and remember longer.
feature.rightDescription: Every feature is designed to move you from “watching” to “skills”. Less confusion, more progress.

live.title: Live online classes
live.desc: Ask questions instantly, practice together, and learn with structure.

replayGroup.title: Replay live group lessons
replayGroup.desc: Every group class is recorded, so you can rewatch it anytime and never miss key details.

autoRecord.title: Auto-record & replay
autoRecord.desc: Rewatch lessons whenever you need — perfect for revision and note-taking.

aiDubbing.title: AI dubbing (multi-language)
aiDubbing.desc: Language is no longer a blocker — focus on the meaning, not translation.

feature.bottomNote: Goal: help every student understand clearly, practice consistently, and turn learning into real skill.

card1.title: Live Interactive Classes
card1.subtitle: Join real-time sessions with instructors and learn by doing.

card2.title: Personalized Progress
card2.subtitle: Smart tracking + recommendations tailored to your goals.

card3.title: Community & Mentors
card3.subtitle: Get feedback and grow faster together.

card4.title: AI Dubbing
card4.subtitle: Understand lessons in your own language — no barriers.

footer.description: Ta'limHub is an education ecosystem that helps learners, teachers, and modern institutions connect through scalable digital learning experiences, smart tools, and AI-powered solutions.

form.title: Let's get in touch
form.description: Leave your information and our team will contact you with the right guidance for your learning journey.
form.success: Your request has been sent successfully ✅
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again ❌

bottom.tagline: Designed for the future of education
